overview.title: Partner Timebanks
overview.description: Connect your timebank with other communities so members can exchange time and skills across borders. This area is only visible to super admins.

disabled_banner.title: Partnering is switched off
disabled_banner.hint: Nothing is shared with other timebanks until you turn it on in Network settings.

errors_banner.title: Some connections had problems recently
errors_banner.hint_one: {{count}} failed call from a partner system in the last 30 days.
errors_banner.hint_other: {{count}} failed calls from partner systems in the last 30 days.

stats.pending_requests_hint: Partnership requests waiting on a decision
stats.exchanges_30d_hint: Time credits sent or received across partners

checklist.title: Getting set up
checklist.hint: Work through these steps to start exchanging with partner timebanks.
checklist.enable: Turn on partnering in Network settings
checklist.profile: Publish your community's listing in the partner directory
checklist.connect: Connect with your first partner timebank
checklist.credit: Agree credit limits with your partners

top_partners.title: Most active partners
top_partners.hint: Where the exchanges happened in the last 30 days.
top_partners.empty_hint: Once you connect with a partner timebank, their activity shows up here.

federation_off.title: Partnering with other timebanks is switched off
federation_off.hint: The federation feature is not enabled for this community. The areas that are available to you are shown alongside.

partnerships.title: Partnerships
partnerships.description: Your agreements with other timebanks on the NEXUS network — who you're connected to, what you share, and requests waiting on a decision.

directory.title: Partner directory
directory.description: Browse other timebanks on the network, ask to partner with them, and manage how your own community appears to others.

directory_profile.title: Our listing
directory_profile.description: How your community appears to other timebanks in the partner directory.

neighborhoods.title: Neighbourhoods
neighborhoods.description: Geographic areas of your community that can be shared with nearby partner timebanks.

credit_agreements.title: Credit agreements
credit_agreements.description: The limits you've agreed with each partner on how many time credits can flow between your communities.

external_partners.title: External platforms
external_partners.description: Connections to timebanks that run on other software — Komunitin, TimeOverflow or Credit Commons — including health checks and call logs.

credit_commons.title: Credit Commons
credit_commons.description: Your community's place in the Credit Commons accounting network — its node identity, parent node and exchange rate.

inbound_api.title: Inbound API partners
inbound_api.description: External systems — banks, payment processors, municipal software — that are allowed to call into your community's data.

caring_peers.title: Partner cooperatives
caring_peers.description: Other caring-community platforms this cooperative exchanges hour transfers with. Each connection has its own shared secret.

api_keys.title: API keys
api_keys.description: The keys partner platforms use to talk to your community securely. Issue, rotate or revoke them here.

create_api_key.title: Create API key
create_api_key.description: Issue a new key for a partner platform, choosing exactly what it is allowed to do.

webhooks.title: Event webhooks
webhooks.description: Automatic notifications sent to partner systems when something happens here — with delivery logs and a test button.

api_docs.title: Developer guide
api_docs.description: Technical reference for the partner API — share this with a partner's developer when they set up a connection.

activity.title: Activity feed
activity.description: A running log of everything exchanged with partner timebanks — transfers, messages and partnership changes.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Charts and numbers for your partner activity — what was exchanged, with whom, and how it's trending.

aggregates.title: Shared statistics
aggregates.description: Your consent for sharing anonymous, aggregated statistics with the wider network — nothing personal ever leaves your community.

data.title: Data management
data.description: Export, import or clean up your partnering data.

settings.title: Network settings
settings.description: The master switches for partnering — turn it on or off, and choose what your community shares with partners.
